origin.motivation: The Country of Origin 'Sweden' stated in the certificate explicitly matches the 'Sweden' origin field in the invoice after normalization. LC exception active limits verification to origin only.

manual_review_triggers: 2.2 LC exception active - only origin verified, other control points set to NOT_APPLICABLE
Certification contains an explicit Letter of Credit number; origin verification only.
overall_assessment.decision_summary: LC exception is active with explicit L/C number '592LC2502563'. Only origin is verified and matches. All other control points classified as NOT_APPLICABLE. Due to LC exception, total verification is limited. Workflow requires manual handling.
overall_assessment.human_explanation: Certifikatet innehåller en uttrycklig hänvisning till Letter of Credit. Endast ursprungsland har verifierats och stämmer mellan dokumenten. Övriga kontrollpunkter omfattas inte av verifiering och är uteslutna från automatisk godkänning.
